leadText: The Gold Bottle Cap (Japanese: きんのおうかん Gold Bottle Cap) is a type of exchangeable item introduced in Generation VII. It is a more valuable version of the Bottle Cap.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Can be traded to Mr. Hyper S M US UM P E , a League Staff attendant Sw Sh , a Veteran BD SP , a man with an Abomasnow S V , or a Fist of Justice attendant ZA to maximize all of a Pokémon's IVs in Hyper Training .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A beautiful bottle cap that gives off a golden gleam. Some people are happy to receive one. S V A lovely gold bottle cap, which is even rarer than a silver bottle cap. Certain people are delighted to be given one of these. ZA A lovely gold bottle cap, which is even rarer than a regular silver one. Certain people are delighted to be given one of these.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO Enables a year-long Hyper Training course where you can fully raise all of a Pokémon's stats.
